ddls:
CREATE TABLE "processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process */,
  "exit_code" INTEGER /* Exit code of the process */,
  "elapsed_secs" REAL /* Total elapsed time for the process in seconds */,
  "user_secs" REAL /* Time spent in user mode in seconds */,
  "sys_secs" REAL /* Time spent in system mode in seconds */,
  "max_rss_KiB" INTEGER /* Maximum resident set size in KiB */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the host where the process was executed */,
  "shell_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shell used for the process */,
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task type */,
  "task_arg" TEXT /* Argument passed to the task */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the process ended */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who executed the process */,
  "command" TEXT /* Full command line used to execute the process */,
  "environment_variables" TEXT /* JSON string of environment variables used during process execution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_shell_id FOREIGN KEY ("shell_id") REFERENCES shells ("shell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_task_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_type_id") REFERENCES task_types ("task_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_hash" TEXT /* Hash value for the host */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the host */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system and version */,
  "last_checked_in" TEXT /* Last time the host checked in with the system */,
  "uptime" INTEGER /* Uptime of the host in seconds */,
  "total_memory" INTEGER /* Total memory of the host in MB */,
  "cpu_cores" INTEGER /* Number of CPU cores on the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shells" (
  "shell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shell */,
  "shell_name" TEXT /* Name of the shell */,
  "shell_hash" TEXT /* Hash value for the shell */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the shell */,
  "default_options" TEXT /* Default options used by the shell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "task_types" (
  "task_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task type */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the task */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the task (1 being highest) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the process was accessed or executed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., execute, view, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process that triggered the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, pending) */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient of the notification (email or user ID) */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource usage entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the process */,
  "cpu_usage" REAL /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory usage in MB */,
  "disk_usage" REAL /* Disk usage in MB */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the resource usage measurement */,
  "network_in" REAL /* Network input in MB */,
  "network_out" REAL /* Network output in MB */,
  "io_read" REAL /* Disk I/O read in MB */,
  "io_write" REAL /* Disk I/O write in MB */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES processes ("process_id")
)
